api_examples.name: Send Simple Notification
api_examples.description: Send a notification to the default configuration
api_examples.curl_command: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/notify -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title": "System Alert", "body": "This is a test notification", "type": "info"}'

api_examples.name: Send to Tagged Group
api_examples.description: Send notification to a specific tag/group

api_examples.name: List All Configured URLs
api_examples.description: Get list of all configured notification URLs/tags

api_examples.name: Add New Notification URL
api_examples.description: Add notification URL(s) to a tag

api_examples.name: Get Tag Details
api_examples.description: Get details about a specific tag

api_examples.name: Remove URL from Tag
api_examples.description: Remove a notification URL from a tag

discord.setup: Create webhook in Discord server settings > Webhooks, copy ID and token

telegram.setup:
1. Talk to @BotFather on Telegram to create bot (get token)
2. Send message to @userinfobot to get your chat ID

slack.setup: Create Slack webhook from workspace settings

email_gmail.setup: Enable 'Less secure apps' or use App Password with 2FA

webhook.setup: Any service that accepts HTTP POST with JSON payload

workflow_examples.name: System Monitoring Alert
workflow_examples.description: Send alert when disk is full
steps: From cron: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/notify/disk-alerts -d '{"title": "Disk Alert", "body": "95% full", "type": "failure"}'

workflow_examples.name: Backup Notifications
steps: Set up tag for backup team
After backup completes, send success notification
If backup fails, send failure notification

workflow_examples.name: Multi-Channel Notifications
workflow_examples.description: Send same message to multiple platforms
steps: Add multiple URLs to same tag: Discord, Telegram, Email
Send once to tag, reaches all platforms
